title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Cancel
scenario: Language update fails and cancelling Houston error screen returns to device home screen on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect the Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device via the app's Home screen.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, navigate to the Language option.
5. Select a different language from the available list.
6. Tap the "Update Now" button to initiate a firmware update for the selected language.
7. While the firmware update is in progress, turn off the headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button) to simulate an update failure.
8. Observe the Houston error screen that appears on the app.
9. Tap the "Cancel" button on the Houston error screen.
expected: After tapping "Cancel" on the Houston error screen, the app returns to the Home screen showing the currently connected device.
